title: The Wither Notch
description: Simply makes the Wither look like a dead Notch.
body:
> Need OptiFine

ㅤㅤMy Headcanon Notch returns in form Wither
![Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7009b0b67226c586ec4a23b2399abd8db8dc16f7_0.webp)
ㅤㅤThe Wither experiments end in success, he begins an invasion of The Overworld, gradually expands his army and terrorizes all living things. However, not all for the sake of infinite power, but for the sake of creating a “New World” since the current one did not really sympathize with him throughout his existence, and he used all his resources and laws for the sake of implementing a crazy idea. In the end, he succeeds, but he did not take into account the fact that by destroying absolutely everything, he destroys himself, which is what happens.
